title: MultiHome
body:
### MultiHome A plugin for home ! ## About This plugin helps you create houses and configure them!
Commands All plugin commands are here!

## Sethome Command: /sethome
Use: /sethome
Description: To create your home
Alias: /sh

## Home Command: /home
Use: /home
Description: To teleport to your home
Alias: /h

## Delhome Command: /delhome
Use: /delhome
Alias: /dh
Description: Delete your home
## HomeList Command: /homelist
Description: Your home list
Alias: /hl
## HomeCoordinates Command: /homecoords
Use: /homecoords
Description: Show your home coordinates
Alias: /hc
## SetDefaultHome Command: /setdefaulthome
Use: /setdefaulthome
Description: Set your new home

## RenameHome Command: /renamehome
Use: /renamehome
Description: Set your new home

Admin commands ## Admin SetTimeTeleport Command: /admin.homeconfigs.teleport_time
Use: /admin.homeconfigs.teleport_time
Description: Set teleport time
License ## License MultiHome created by [MazeGroup](https://mazegroup.org), [MazeGroup & Co](https://mazegroup.org//wiki/index.php/MazeGroup_%26_Co.) and licensed under [L.P.M.C.](https://mazegroup.org/wiki/index.php/Licence_LPMC) MultiHome is a plugin from FreedomSMP (A private SMP)
